name: ocr-mcp
description: FastMCP 3.4+ OCR server with 14 backends: Unlimited-OCR, PaddleOCR-VL-1.5, DeepSeek-OCR-2, Nemotron VL 8B, MinerU2.5-Pro, olmOCR-2, Mistral OCR, Qwen2.5-VL, GOT-OCR 2.0, DOTS.OCR, PP-OCRv5, EasyOCR, Tesseract. WIA scanner, batch pipelines, agentic workflows.

tools.name: process_document
tools.description: Core OCR with 14 backends: process, batch, layout analysis, table extraction, form detection, quality assessment, backend comparison

tools.name: manage_image
tools.description: Image preprocessing and format conversion: deskew, denoise, grayscale, threshold, autocrop, PDF rasterization

tools.name: operate_scanner
tools.description: WIA scanner control (Windows): list scanners, configure, scan, batch scan, preview, diagnostics

tools.name: manage_workflow
tools.description: Batch processing, pipelines, quality optimizer, backend management, health checks

tools.name: manage_corpus
tools.description: Document corpus: register, search, metadata, OCR result attachment

tools.name: get_help
tools.description: Contextual documentation for all tools and configuration

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: System health: backends, models, server status
